title: Not Enough Stone
description: Use thousands of useless stone to make powerful tools
body:
## About This mod allows you to craft Geomatter from stone and its variants. It can then be used in crafting of Geomatter tools, the mining speed or damage of which is buffed based on total number of stone used.
Geomatter Recipe ![Geomatter from Stone](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9650d29104296b73d4c9c22826d95061259eef2.png) Possible Ingredients: - Stone - Cobblestone - Cobbled Deepslate - Deepslate - Tuff - Diorite - Andesite - Granite - Dripstone - Pointed Dripstone - **Geomatter itself and Geomatter tools (see below)**
Tool Recipes ![Geomatter Tools Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/884b3ce4284a4e0768f6ee5d3e9808a4a818ff94.png)
Mega Tools - Mega Sword: has more damage, but less attack speed. Uses claymore animations and has higher attack range if [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) is installed. - Mega Pickaxe and Shovel: mine 3x3, but 9 times slower. ![Mega Tools Recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f61d06784c4d3ba0edb78a6738cb8d0e7fcaa6ab.png)
Tool Recycling Tools can be used to craft Geomatter once again:

![Geomatter Shovel being used to craft more Geomatter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d97911ba93f5f6d21613c37ec557fe01863b35f1.png)
## Configuration Configure the multipliers of the summands used for calculating stats of the Geomatter tools: - Capped linear summand - biggest impact on low stone counts (< 200) - Logarithmic summand (multiplied by a linear factor capped at 1) - biggest impact on large stone counts (< 10k) - Uncapped linear summand - biggest impact on huge stone counts (> 100k) ## Requirements - [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
